title: helichrysum citrispinum var. hoehnelii
intro: Helichrysum citrispinum var. hoehnelii, also known as Helichrysum hoehnelii, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is a flowering plant with medicinal properties, particularly known for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Helichrysum hoehnelii include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and offering protection against oxidative stress. This plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to support overall well-being and address specific health concerns.
